name: grok-resume
description: Source-faithful Grok Build resume-codex and resume-claude skills with the complete inert session reader and cross-platform wrapper compatibility.

interface.shortDescription: Resume Codex or Claude sessions safely
interface.longDescription: Extracted from Grok Build 0.2.106, this plugin reads Codex and Claude Code session stores as untrusted inert history, produces a concise handoff, and verifies current repository state before continuing.
interface.defaultPrompt: Resume my most recent coding-agent session for this repository.
